dispositions.reason: Direct <command> --help is the canonical help contract; help <path> compatibility is optional.
Inferred diagnostic-probe coverage gap; not treated as a dogfood product blocker until command-level evidence shows unclear clap diagnostics.
Requires safe fixture operands for role, persona, and context_dir; tracked separately from dogfood CI readiness.
Blocked probes are expected for commands requiring target paths, artifact directories, baselines, or fixture context in isolated dogfood measurement.
